title: Cheap anvils
description: This project changes the crafting recipe of anvils.
body:
Cheap anvils is a datapack used so anvils are not so expensive. Usually with the 3 iron blocks they have and the 4 iron ingots this can add up fast to a combined total of 31 iron ingots. With this datapack the iron blocks are replaced with iron ingots so it reduces it to only 7 iron ingots.

If there is a version that does not exist please email me here so i know to add it:
zwhseton@gmail.com
